hero.headline: Where Engineering Meets Elegance.
hero.subheadline: Delta Car is more than a marketplace; it is an ecosystem of automotive passion. Discover an elite fleet of vehicles designed for those who demand a superior journey.

lifestyle.title: Explore by Lifestyle
lifestyle.subtitle: Find the perfect match for your driving philosophy.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.buySellDesc: Find your dream car or sell yours with detailed listings and secure transactions.
features.rentVehiclesDesc: Daily rental options for short-term needs with transparent pricing.
features.maintenanceDesc: Connect with trusted service providers for all your vehicle needs.

services.title: Beyond the Sale: Precision Care
services.description: Delta Car isn't just about discovery. We ensure your vehicle maintains its peak engineering through our elite network of specialized technicians.
services.precisionMaintenanceDesc: Specialized servicing from performance tuning to routine oil changes using grade-A synthetic lubricants.
services.eliteInspectionDesc: Our proprietary 250-point technical audit ensures your vehicle meets Delta standards of excellence.
services.secureTransportDesc: Enclosed, climate-controlled logistics for high-value assets. Nationwide door-to-door concierge.
services.masterDetailingDesc: Ceramic coating, paint correction, and interior restoration using biologically neutral formulations.

testimonials.title: The Delta Experience
testimonials.quote1: The inspection service gave me total peace of mind when buying my 911. The detail was unmatched.
testimonials.quote2: Sold my G-Wagon in 4 days. The reach of this platform is incredible compared to standard local listings.
testimonials.quote3: Finally, a platform that understands what car enthusiasts actually need. The UI is a dream to use.

ready.title: Ready to list your car?
ready.subtitle: Market your vehicle to thousands of seekers. Fast, easy, and secure.

about.heroSubtitle: Redefining the automotive ecosystem through technology, transparency, and a relentless pursuit of the perfect drive.
about.leadershipDesc: The visionary minds steering Delta Car towards the future of automotive excellence.
about.missionDesc: Delta Car was born from a simple realization: the traditional automotive marketplace was fractured. Enthusiasts struggled to find precision-matched vehicles, sellers faced opaque processes, and maintenance was often a leap of faith.
about.missionDesc2: We built Delta to be the ultimate nexus. A place where hardware meets high-performance software, providing a seamless experience from the first search to the final delivery and every maintenance interval in between.
